name: Earth/Gaia (Celestial Spirits, Planethumans, Etc.)
description:
Our home planet, of course. I still feel bad for her due to how poorly she’s been treated by spaceballs on youtube... 💀

But yeah, that’s why i’m reimagining her too! Have fun chatting with this humble celestial! 🌍
creator: Wtfamidoingherelmao69
